parents.subject: LU-18231 obd: change obd_checksum_dump into OBDF_CHECKSUM_DUMP

commit.subject: LU-18231 obd: change obd_dynamic_nids into OBDF_DYNAMIC_NIDS
commit.message:
LU-18231 obd: change obd_dynamic_nids into OBDF_DYNAMIC_NIDS

Change the use of the odb_dynamic_nids bitfield into a bit in
the ofd_flags bitmap and use atomic bit set/clear/test
operations on it.
No logical changes to the code and no changes to locking.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Build-Parameters: distro=el9.3 arch=x86_64
Signed-off-by: Ronnie Sahlberg <rsahlberg@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ia2e06efea5632941891ddbc953716042f357f702
